title: Customs Mod
description: A mod that add some blocks and items for airports, ports, train stations, and custom checkpoints.
body:
# Customs Mod
> A decoritive and funcunal mod for airports, ports, and train stations' sucurity/customs checkpoints.
## Block & Items
### Kiosk
>A block for scaning ID Cards. Requires an ID card to produce a redstone output.
### ID Card
>A item used to identify yourself at checkpoints.
### Turnstile
>A barrier when powered by redstone opens.
### Barrier
>Simple metal barrier for crowd control.
### Rope barrier (C) _WIP_
>A simple barrier. (on center of block)
### Rope barrier (S) _WIP_
>A simple barrier. (on side of block)

|Added      |In-Progress |
|:---------:|:----------:|
|ID Card    |Rope Barrier(C+S)|
|Kosk       |Metal Detector|
|Turnstyle  ||
